hook: So at 67, we know I've mopped a ton of floors.
transcript: So at 67, we know I've mopped a ton of floors. I don't clean any more full-time. It's just for my personal use. And look how cute it is. And look, it goes with my toenails. They're purple. Nice big head so that I'll be able to get it done quick. Come from the good old day when you underquoted everybody and had to get it done in one quarter of the time. Okay, one thing is I don't know how to get these little sticks out, so I probably should have read the directions. Oh, look, they just come out this way. I think. Oh, yeah, they do. How do I get in there? I have huge hands. Oh, they came with two extra things. I think this would just pull off. Well, that was pretty easy. I was afraid to break it. There's two extra mop heads, so there's three come with it. Hopefully it has pitchers because I'm not good unless I have pitchers. Oh, look, it even has a pinch handle. Well, I guess I didn't do that right, did I? Okay, what did I do wrong? Surely I need... Oh. I'm not an engineer, that's for sure. When in doubt, just look at the directions, right? Okay, so see this little hole right here? Just clips right on there. And I am 5'9", so I need a long stick. It's adorable. This side is your tank of water, and this is the dry. It says to put it in here until it's wet. I guess it helped if I turn it the right way. To your desired wetness. I think that would be it. So then you put it in the dry one, and you do it to your desired dryness. I might go one more since it's wood floors. They said you could do it up to like six times. So easy. Glides super easy. No stiffness, no sticking. It's very soft and smooth. So that was pretty dirty. So this just washes off the debris, which is great. And then just bring it back through here. hook: This is your sign to officially learn how to mop your floors, featuring the viral rinse clean spin mop from Ocedar.
transcript: This is your sign to officially learn how to mop your floors, featuring the viral rinse clean spin mop from Ocedar. All you have to do is fill up the tank with water. I love that it keeps clean and dirty water separate so your floors stay spotless as you mop. And for some extra cleaning power, I'm popping in some Pax floor cleaner. Then just dip the mop in the floor cleaner and spin. My first mopping tip is to start at the farthest wall and work your way backward towards an exit. This way, you won't step on your freshly mopped floors. Moving on to the living room, my second tip is to make sure you mop along the grain, and this way you'll hide any potential streaks. And these mop heads are washable, which means they're entirely reusable. And then cleanup is as easy as dumping that dirty water into the sink. This mop made my floors really nice and shiny. Ten out of ten, this rinse clean spin mop will leave you floored.
